creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
The bottom of the manpage on getlogin says:

		HISTORY
			 The getlogin() function first appeared in 4.4BSD.

			 4.2 Berkeley Distribution        June 9, 1993

	It is wrong for it to claim to be 4.2BSD docs when system call was
	introduced with 4.4BSD, right?

Fix: 

call mpp  :-)
How-To-Repeat: 
	man getlogin
